evals.prompt: I need to add OAuth2 authentication to my web app. It touches the frontend, backend, database, and tests. How should I plan this?
evals.expected_output: The agent applies the GOAP planning cycle: ANALYZE (complex, cross-domain) → DECOMPOSE (frontend, backend, DB, tests as sub-goals) → STRATEGIZE (hybrid or sequential due to dependencies) → COORDINATE (assign agents) → EXECUTE with quality gates.
assertions: The agent follows the GOAP planning cycle (analyze, decompose, strategize)
The agent identifies sub-goals with priorities and dependencies
The agent selects an appropriate strategy (sequential or hybrid)

evals.prompt: Fix all 15 failing tests in our test suite
evals.expected_output: The agent decomposes into: run tests to identify failures → group by module → fix in parallel or sequentially → verify. Uses task-decomposition and selects appropriate agents.
assertions: The agent first runs tests to identify specific failures
The agent groups or prioritizes the failures
The agent assigns appropriate agents (debugger, test-runner)
The agent includes a verification step

evals.prompt: Our API response time went from 200ms to 2 seconds after the last deploy. Investigate and fix.
evals.expected_output: The agent applies GOAP: ANALYZE (performance regression) → investigate in parallel (profiler, recent code changes, benchmarks) → diagnose → fix → verify. Uses swarm for investigation.
assertions: The agent uses parallel investigation from multiple angles
The agent maps agents to investigation tasks
The agent includes a verification step after fix

evals.prompt: I want to migrate from REST to GraphQL. This is a big project.
evals.expected_output: The agent applies GOAP for complex tasks: decompose into phases (schema design, resolvers, client migration, testing, deprecation), select hybrid strategy, define quality gates between phases.
assertions: The agent identifies this as a complex multi-step task
The agent decomposes into logical phases or sub-goals
The agent defines quality gates between phases
The agent selects hybrid or phased strategy
